title: cynanchum maritimum
intro: Cynanchum maritimum, also known as Sea Glue or Sea Swallowwort, is a plant species in the Apocynaceae family, commonly found in coastal areas. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cynanchum maritimum include reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as potentially treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Cynanchum maritimum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although its use should be guided by a healthcare professional due to limited scientific research.
